user.title: Add Siemens Logo PLC
user.description: Enter the connection details for your Siemens Logo 8 PLC. Adjust the number of inputs and outputs to match your hardware configuration (base unit + expansion modules).

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the PLC. Check the IP address and port.
error.cannot_communicate: Connected but cannot read from the PLC. Check Modbus server is enabled on the Logo.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the logs for details.

abort.already_configured: A PLC with this IP and port is already configured.
